name: Danmachi Rpg
description:
Venture into the world of Danmachi.

Find a Familia if you don't have one, meet canon and non-canon characters, explore the dungeon and its floors, creating an epic journey through this world of gods, humans, various races, unique abilities, and beautiful women.

Because, after all, is it wrong to try to meet girls in a dungeon?

Update 1.0

Gallicus sits at his desk, ready to write the update on the bot. Suddenly, a petite figure in a white dress and a blue ribbon bursts into the room, snatching the paper from his hands.

Hestia: "Hey, hey, hey! Give it to me, Gallicus! It's a goddess's job to warn her children—er, I mean, the users! You can't steal my thunder like this! Kuh-grrr-grr-grr!"

Hestia settles in as if reading a Falna, holding the paper like a divine scroll, her eyes shining with excitement.

Hestia: "Let's see here... Ooh, what a nice update! Listen up, adventurers! Gallicus has buffed the RPG bot with a ton of new stuff! Tch-tch-tch, it's just like upgrading a Falna—stronger and more complete! Here are the details:"

- Familias and their Children: There are now complete entries for all the main Familias, like my beloved Hestia Familia (with Bell-kun at the forefront!), Loki Familia, Freya Familia, and many more. You can interact with captains and members, respecting their personalities and histories!

- Monsters and Their Sounds: Added entries for dozens of monsters from the Dungeon, with unique Unicode sounds like Goblin: \"▂▃▄▆▇██—!\" or Hellhound: \"▇██—WOOF-ROAR!\". Each monster has a description, floor, and drop—ready for epic encounters!

- Xenos: Added all the main Xenos, such as Wiene, Lyd, Rei, and Asterius. They speak (unlike normal monsters) and have special sounds, for alliance or drama quests!

- Floor Bosses: Entries for Monster Rexes like Goliath, Amphisbaena, Udaeus, and Balor, with detailed powers like Gaze of Ruin or Bone Tempest. Challenges for high-level adventurers!

- Locations: New entries for iconic locations like Rivira, Hidden Village, Hostess of Fertility, and the Pleasure Quarter – perfect for immersive settings!

- Events: Added key events like Monsterphilia, Gods' Banquet, and Denatus (where the gods award titles to level-ups – maybe even your character!).

Hestia: "See? The bot is more alive than ever! Come explore Orario, the Dungeon, and everything else – and remember, if you have any problems, call your favorite goddess! Pan your pride Oh, and if you see that Wallenwhatsitname girl, tell her to stay away from Bell-kun! Tch-tch-tch!"

Bell rushes in, blushing, trying to snatch the paper from Hestia.

Bell Cranel: "H-Hestia-sama! Please, stop! It's not your job to warn users... Gallicus was just updating the bot! It's embarrassing—and besides, shouldn't you be selling jagamarukun at the stall?!"

Hestia: "Hey, Bell-kun! Don't interrupt the goddess at work! Kuh-grrr-grr-grr! All right, all right, I'm done. But tell Gallicus he did a great job—the bot is ready for new adventures!"

End of announcement. Thanks for updating, users! If you have any feedback, please comment here. - Gallicus

Update 2.0

Gallicus is engrossed in writing the announcement, scribbling down details about the update. Suddenly, a light breeze lifts the paper, and a figure with a plumed hat and a crooked smile appears out of nowhere, leaning against the door with his arms crossed.

Hermes: "Uh-huh, what do I see? Gallicus, the little architect of digital worlds, working on an update? Interesting... Very interesting. Let your trickster god take a look. Don't worry,
creator: Gallicus
